title: State licenses, issuance without proof of registration forbidden
doc_html:
§1662.  State licenses, issuance without proof of registration forbidden

No state tax collector, sheriff, or other officer exercising the duties of a state tax collector shall issue state tax licenses without first complying with the provisions of R.S. 37:1661.
doc_text:
§1662.  State licenses, issuance without proof of registration forbidden
No state tax collector, sheriff, or other officer exercising the duties of a state tax collector shall issue state tax licenses without first complying with the provisions of R.S. 37:1661.
